title: argyranthemum pinnatifidum subsp. montanum
intro: Argyranthemum pinnatifidum subsp. montanum, also known as the Canary Island daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Argyranthemum pinnatifidum subsp. montanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
